title: backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint
author: harrshita123

findings.description: PR branch contains merge commit 'Merge branch main into fix-5799-jaeger-endpoint'. Project convention requires rebase onto main. Run: git rebase origin/main && git push --force-with-lease.
Commit 'backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint' missing SubArea segment. Suggest: 'backend: telemetry: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint'.
validateTracing() cleanly extracted; rejects Jaeger when stdout not enabled, consistent with runtime precedence in createTracingExporter.
Runtime Jaeger guard placed after stdout early-return, correctly preserving stdout-priority behavior.
New test cases cover both the rejection path and the stdout-priority path with correct error message assertions.
